## Summary

Created **two new files** in the existing `internal/git` package, faithfully porting the proven commit-pi history reads:

### `internal/git/log.go`
Three thin methods over the shipped unexported `(g *Git) run(args ...string)` exec seam (no go-git, no sh -c — `--format=---%n%B` / `--format=%s` / `-<n>` all passed as literal args):
- **`CommitCount()`** — `git rev-list --count HEAD`; unborn repo (exit 128, "unknown revision") → `(0, nil)` mirroring `RevParseHEAD` verbatim.
- **`RecentMessages(n)`** — `git log --format=---%n%B -<n>`; returns RAW output (no trim, no line cap); unborn repo (exit 128, "does not have any commits yet") → `("", nil)`.
- **`RecentSubjects(n)`** — `git log --format=%s -<n>`; splits/trims/drops-empties, newest-first; unborn → `(nil, nil)`.

Plain `package git` line; stdlib-only imports (`errors`, `fmt`, `strconv`, `strings`); godoc cites PRD §22.3/§19, reference_impl.md §1 (RecentMessages also §6), external_deps.md §D.

### `internal/git/log_test.go`
White-box `package git`, stdlib `testing` only, composes the S2 harness (`newTempRepo`/`seedCommits`), drives the real git 2.54.0 binary — 6 tests covering all contract scenarios.

### Validation gates (all green)
| Gate | Result |
|------|--------|
| L1 `go build ./internal/git/` | ✅ clean |
| L2 `go vet ./internal/git/` | ✅ clean |
| L3 `gofmt -l internal/git/` | ✅ empty |
| L4 `go test ./internal/git/` | ✅ PASS (6 log tests + S1/S2/T2/T3) |
| L5 `go test ./...` | ✅ whole-module green |

### Scope boundaries respected
Only `log.go` + `log_test.go` created; `// Package git` doc appears exactly once (in `git.go`); go.mod/go.sum untouched; no `go mod tidy`; no go-git; `stage.go` (T4.S2) NOT created. I empirically verified the two distinct unborn-detection substrings ("unknown revision" vs "does not have any commits yet") and the raw `---%n%B` blank-line-preserving output against the real git binary before coding.

```json

   "result": "success",
   "message": "Implemented P1.M3.T4.S1: created internal/git/log.go (CommitCount/RecentMessages/RecentSubjects, thin methods over the shipped g.run exec seam, stdlib-only) and internal/git/log_test.go (white-box package git, 6 contract scenarios via the S2 harness + real git 2.54.0). All 5 validation gates pass: go build/vet/gofmt clean, go test ./internal/git/ PASS (6 new log tests + existing S1/S2/T2/T3 unaffected), go test ./... whole-module green. Empirically verified the two distinct unborn-repo stderr substrings ('unknown revision' for rev-list, 'does not have any commits yet' for git log) and the raw ---%n%B blank-line-preserving output against the real binary. Scope boundaries respected: only 2 files created, // Package git doc appears once (in git.go), go.mod/go.sum untouched, no go-git, no go mod tidy, stage.go (T4.S2) not created."
}
```
